app.name: SideStack
app.description: A native Android app store for sideloaded apps. Browse, download, and install all SideStack apps from a single clean interface on your device. No Play Store. No accounts. No nonsense.

features.title: App Store
features.description: Browse all available SideStack apps from a single native interface with clean app cards showing icon, name, version, and category.

features.title: In-App Downloads
features.description: Tap any app card to view its full page inside the app. Download APKs directly — no browser required. Install prompt triggers automatically on completion.

features.title: Search
features.description: Filter apps by name, category, or description instantly as you type. Find what you want without scrolling.

features.title: Update Tracker
features.description: SideStack checks installed apps against the latest available versions and shows a dedicated screen listing every app with an update ready to download.

downloads.description: Works on all supported Android devices.
